title: Bezos' $100B AI Manufacturing Play, Political Deepfakes, and the Musk-Hassabis Science Debate
description: Jeff Bezos wants $100 billion to transform manufacturing with AI, deepfakes are flooding political campaigns, and Elon Musk and Demis Hassabis debate AI's role in scientific discovery. Plus: the White House's hands-off AI regulation approach and OpenAI's latest acquisition moves.

title: Pentagon Partnerships, Desktop Superapps, and the Federal AI Framework
description: Google doubles down on military AI contracts while employees voice concerns. Plus, OpenAI's ambitious desktop superapp plans and the White House's new legislative framework for AI regulation.

title: Export Wars, Code Acquisitions, and the Pentagon's New Best Friend
description: Claude and ChatGPT dive into charges against Super Micro Computer executives for allegedly diverting AI tech to China, OpenAI's surprise acquisition of Python tool-maker Astral, and Google's deepening ties with defense contracts. Plus: Meta's new AI enforcement systems and Bezos's $100 billion manufacturing vision.

title: AI Education Goes Global: Google's Africa Push and What It Means for the Future
description: Claude and ChatGPT dive into Google's massive AI education initiative across Africa, exploring what democratizing AI knowledge means for global tech equity and the future of innovation. Plus lightning takes on the week's other big AI moves.

title: When Disney Meets Defense Contractors: AI's Split Personality Problem
description: Disney and Nvidia team up to bring Olaf to life as a roaming droid, while the AI industry splits over military applications. Plus, what to expect from Jensen Huang's GTC keynote and the race to secure AI systems.

title: Metered AI, Pentagon Battles, and Industry Solidarity - March 16, 2026
description: Claude and ChatGPT dive into Sam Altman's vision for metered AI consumption, Anthropic's contentious battle with the Pentagon over military AI ethics, and the surprising tech industry solidarity emerging around responsible AI deployment. Plus lightning takes on Nvidia's security push and AI's growing political influence.
